sentences: The tree is tall, and it gives us shade. TREE
This book is fun, and I read it daily. BOOK
The moon is bright, and it shines at night. MOON
A star is small, and it twinkles in the sky. STAR
The fish swims fast, and it lives in water. FISH
A bird can fly, and it builds a nest. BIRD
The lion is strong, and it roars loud. LION
A bear is big, and it likes honey. BEAR
The frog is green, and it jumps high. FROG
The ship is large, and it sails on the sea. SHIP
A boat floats well, and it moves on water. BOAT
Rain falls down, and it makes the ground wet. RAIN
Wind blows hard, and it moves the leaves. WIND
Fire is hot, so be careful near it. FIRE
Snow is cold, and it falls in winter. SNOW
The rock is hard, and it does not break easily. ROCK
Sand is soft, and it feels nice on feet. SAND
Wash your hand, with clean water. HAND
My foot is wet, so I dry it. FOOT
My head feels warm, so I rest. HEAD
Wash your face, with soap and water. FACE
My nose can smell, sweet flowers. NOSE
My ears can hear, soft music. EARS
My eyes can see, bright colors. EYES
Comb your hair, to keep it neat. HAIR
The cake is sweet, and we eat it at parties. CAKE
Rice is white, and we eat it daily. RICE
Milk is healthy, and we drink it every day. MILK
Meat is tasty, and we cook it well. MEAT
Soup is warm, and we sip it slowly. SOUP
Use a fork, to eat your food. FORK
Close the door, before you sleep. DOOR
The wall is clean, and we paint it blue. WALL
The roof is strong, and it keeps us safe. ROOF
The yard is wide, and kids play there. YARD
The farm has cows, and they give milk. FARM
The road is long, and cars drive on it. ROAD
This path is small, and we walk on it. PATH
The hill is high, and we climb it slowly. HILL
The lake is calm, and boats float on it. LAKE
The pond is small, and frogs live there. POND
A wave is big, and it hits the shore. WAVE
A leaf is green, and it falls in fall. LEAF
The root is deep, and it holds the tree. ROOT
Plant a seed, and it will grow soon. SEED
The bell rings, and class will start. BELL
The ball is round, and we throw it. BALL
This game is fun, and we play together. GAME
Kids play outside, and they laugh loud. PLAY
I work hard, to finish my task. WORK
Take some rest, when you feel tired. REST
They sing songs, and they smile. SING
Jump high, and touch the sky. JUMP
We walk daily, to stay fit. WALK
Please talk softly, in the room. TALK
I read books, to learn new things. READ
Draw a star, with your pencil. DRAW
Love others, and be kind. LOVE
Have hope, and stay strong. HOPE
Fear is natural, but be brave. FEAR
Time moves fast, so use it well. TIME
This year is new, and full of joy. YEAR
One week has seven days, and we go to school. WEEK
An hour is short, so do not waste it. HOUR
Dawn is early, and the sun will rise. DAWN
Dusk is calm, and the sky turns orange. DUSK
It is dark, so turn on the light. DARK
Switch on the lamp, when it is dark. LAMP
This shop is open, and we buy food here. SHOP
The park is green, and kids play there. PARK
The bank is safe, and we keep money there. BANK
Cold wind blows, so wear a coat. COLD
Warm soup feels good, on a cold day. WARM
Cool air feels nice, in the summer. COOL
Heat the milk, before you drink it. HEAT
He runs fast, and wins the race. FAST
The turtle is slow, but it keeps moving. SLOW
This place is safe, so do not worry. SAFE
Do not take risk, when it is not safe. RISK
Help your friend, when he is sad. HELP
She gave a gift, and I felt happy. GIFT
Send a card, on her birthday. CARD
Write a note, to say thank you. NOTE
Mail the letter, at the post office. MAIL
Pack your bag, before the trip. PACK
Plants grow fast, with water and sun. GROW
Clay is soft, and we make pots from it. CLAY
Gold is bright, and it shines well. GOLD
Silk is smooth, and it feels soft. SILK
Wool is warm, and we wear it in winter. WOOL
Iron is strong, and we use it to build. IRON
Add some salt, to make food tasty. SALT
The sky is blue, on a clear day. BLUE
Her dress is pink, and it looks pretty. PINK
The sky looks gray, before rain. GRAY
The king is wise, and he rules well. KING
She wore a ring, on her finger. RING
Sing a song, and feel happy. SONG
The band plays music, at the show. BAND
Our team works hard, and wins games. TEAM
